scope: Full-Corpus (W40K Pässe 1..9 + HH Pässe 10..15, batches ssot-w40k-001..057 + ssot-hh-001..030)

summary.$comment: Stand Phase 3 (alle Achsen adjudiziert). 2 Character-Merges (1 cross-era lore-deep, 1 same-era mechanical), 0 Faction-Merges, 0 Location-Merges. Pass-2-Total identisch zu Pass-1 in Merge-Count (1 Lore-Deep + 1 Mechanical) — Pass-1 hatte 1 Location-Mechanical + 1 Character-Mechanical, Pass-2 hat 1 Character-Lore-Deep + 1 Character-Mechanical.

merges.evidence: Cross-era identity: HH-era Dark Angels chapter-master Merir Astelan (Pass-13 Phase 3 freq=1, Call of the Lion HH-0154 Astelan vs Belath compliance debate) is the same individual as the W40K-era Fallen Angel Astelan (Lexicanum lemma 'Merir Astelan'; Fallen-Angel-interrogations lore-cluster). The merir_astelan row's own notes explicitly document the cross-era continuity ('Cross-arc with the Fallen / Cypher / Lion arcs; his post-Heresy First-of-the-Fallen status is downstream from his Pass-13 surface'); the Pass-13 implementer recognized the identity but lacked the ADR-policy (Brief 100) to consolidate. Per Cross-Era-Identities ADR (W40K-canonical short-form as keeper, HH-era full name as alias — analogous to horus / lorgar / typhus / corax), keeper = astelan.

fromMergee.reason: keeper.notes was null; mergee.notes carries Pass-13 HH-era context worth preserving + cross-era narrative
fromMergee.newValue: Cross-era identity: HH-era Dark Angels chapter-master Merir Astelan (Resolver-Pass 13 Phase 3, freq=1) debating compliance around Byzanthis in Call of the Lion (HH-0154, Astelan vs Belath compliance debate); cross-arc with the Fallen / Cypher / Lion arcs. Post-Heresy: First-of-the-Fallen renegade. primaryFactionId fallen_angels reflects the W40K-era canonical state (keeper-wins per consolidation-pass-2 field-retention; HH-era dark_angels affiliation captured here via cross-era note per ADR cross-era-identities). Consolidation-Pass 2 merge of merir_astelan (HH-era surface form) into astelan (W40K-canonical row).

fieldRetention.primaryFactionIdNote: keeper-wins; mergee had dark_angels (HH-era pre-fall affiliation). W40K-canonical state preserved per ADR cross-era-identities.

merges.evidence: Same-era cross-pass doublette: Resolver-Pass 11 created `sharrowkyn` (Phase 3 7c freq=1, Angel Exterminatus HH-0023 — Raven Guard sniper, Shattered Legions associate); Resolver-Pass 13 created `nykona_sharrowkyn` (Phase 3 7c freq=1 promote, Kryptos HH-0167 — Raven Guard Shadowmaster paired with Sabik Wayland + Sisypheum origin). Both novels are Graham McNeill, both rows have primaryFactionId='raven_guard', both reference the same Mor Deythan Raven-Guard sniper character in the Shattered-Legions/Sisypheum saga. Pass-11→Pass-13 cross-wave honorific/surname-prefix miss; mechanically eindeutige Doublette. Class-identical to Pass-1 magister_sek → anakwanar_sek (Pass-9-implementer missed Pass-1 anchor on honorific strip).

fromMergee.reason: both rows have unique Pass-context notes worth preserving — keeper's Pass-13 Kryptos/Sisypheum notes enriched with mergee's Pass-11 Angel-Exterminatus anchor
fromMergee.newValue: Resolver-Pass 13 Phase 3 (7c medium freq=1 Phase-3-promote per dossier recommendation — Raven Guard Shadowmaster debut, cross-arc with the Sisypheum arc + future Shattered-Legions novellas): Raven Guard Shadowmaster debut paired with Sabik Wayland; Kryptos (HH-0167, Graham McNeill — Sharrowkyn / Wayland + Sisypheum origin). Earlier Resolver-Pass 11 Phase 3 surface (7c curated freq=1 lore-iconic): Raven Guard sniper, Shattered Legions associate, Angel Exterminatus (HH-0023). primaryFactionId raven_guard. Consolidation-Pass 2 merge of sharrowkyn (surname-only short-form, Pass-11 surface) into nykona_sharrowkyn (full canonical name, Pass-13 surface).

fieldRetention.primaryFactionIdNote: both rows had raven_guard — no conflict.
